cards.back: A type of requirement modeling that focuses on the flow of interactions between users, systems, and other stakeholders to identify requirements
A flow-oriented modeling technique that represents user tasks and activities to identify requirements
A flow-oriented modeling technique that describes how users interact with a system to identify functional requirements
A flow-oriented modeling technique that represents the possible states and transitions of a system to identify requirements
A flow-oriented modeling technique that describes the behavior of a system in response to user interactions to identify functional requirements
